UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user within the PassGuard application, linking to an external authentication system and acting as the owner of all associated password entries.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

externalUserId.description: Unique identifier for the user as provided by the external authentication system (e.g., Google Auth ID, custom Auth0 ID).

email.description: The primary email address associated with the user profile.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

PasswordEntry.title: PasswordEntry
PasswordEntry.description: Represents a single stored password entry for a specific website, application, or service within the PassGuard application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PasswordEntry entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile that owns this password entry. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N PasswordEntry)

name.description: The name of the website, application, or service associated with this password entry (e.g., 'Instagram', 'Bank Account Login').

username.description: The username or email address used to log in to the associated service.

encryptedPassword.description: The securely encrypted password for the entry. This field stores the ciphertext, not the plain-text password.

url.description: Optional URL of the website or service associated with this password entry.

notes.description: Optional additional notes or context about the password entry.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the password entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the password entry was last updated.

PasswordGenerationDetail.title: PasswordGenerationDetail
PasswordGenerationDetail.description: Stores the specific criteria and parameters that were used to generate a particular password, linked to a PasswordEntry.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PasswordGenerationDetail entity.

passwordEntryId.description: Reference to the PasswordEntry this generation detail belongs to. (Relationship: PasswordEntry 1:1 PasswordGenerationDetail)

length.description: The total desired length of the generated password.

includeSpecialCharacters.description: Indicates whether special characters were included in the generated password.

specialCharactersCount.description: The number of special characters included in the generated password.

includeUppercase.description: Indicates whether uppercase letters were included in the generated password.

uppercaseCount.description: The number of uppercase letters included in the generated password.

includeLowercase.description: Indicates whether lowercase letters were included in the generated password.

lowercaseCount.description: The number of lowercase letters included in the generated password.

includeNumbers.description: Indicates whether numbers were included in the generated password.

numbersCount.description: The number of digits (numbers) included in the generated password.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. The document ID '{userId}' MUST match the Firebase Authentication UID (`request.auth.uid`) for direct ownership. Includes 'externalUserId' field which is also expected to be `request.auth.uid` for clarity.

Stores all password entries belonging to a specific user. The 'userProfileId' field within each document is denormalized and MUST match the '{userId}' in the path for authorization independence. All documents in this collection are private to the owning user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user (matching Firebase Auth UID) who owns this password entry.

params.name: passwordEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific password entry.

definition.description: Stores the generation details for a specific password entry. The 'passwordEntryId' field within the document is denormalized and MUST match the '{passwordEntryId}' in the path. Access is implicitly controlled by the parent 'userId'.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user (matching Firebase Auth UID) who owns this password entry and its generation details.

params.name: passwordEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent password entry.

params.name: generationDetailId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific password generation details.

firestore.reasoning: The recommended Firestore data structure for PassGuard prioritizes secure, user-centric data isolation, ensuring Authorization Independence and robust Queryable Access Patterns (QAPs). The core principle is to segregate all user-owned data under a dedicated user path. This design eliminates the need for `get()` calls in security rules, significantly simplifying rule logic and improving performance and debuggability.
